context.quote_text: “ Good Heaven ! What is to become of us ? What are we to do ? ”
“ How can you be smiling so , Lizzy ? ”
“ I cried for two days together when Colonel Miller ’s regiment went away . I thought I should have broke my heart . ”
“ I am sure I shall break _ mine _ , ”

quotes.quote_text: “ I cried for two days together when Colonel Miller ’s regiment went away . I thought I should have broke my heart . ”

context.quote_text: “ How can you be smiling so , Lizzy ? ”
“ I am sure I shall break _ mine _ , ”
“ If one could but go to Brighton ! ”

quotes.quote_text: “ Oh yes!--if one could but go to Brighton ! But papa is so disagreeable . ”

context.quote_text: “ I am sure I shall break _ mine _ , ”
“ If one could but go to Brighton ! ”
“ A little sea - bathing would set me up for ever . ”
“ And my aunt Philips is sure it would do _ me _ a great deal of good , ”

context.quote_text: “ If one could but go to Brighton ! ”
“ Oh yes!--if one could but go to Brighton ! But papa is so disagreeable . ”
“ And my aunt Philips is sure it would do _ me _ a great deal of good , ”
“ I can not see why Mrs. Forster should not ask _ me _ as well as Lydia , ”
